title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・“負けない”

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City loses to Tamamo Cross and realizes
how poorly she has been running up to now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, for the first time, she experiences true
frustration. She has been so concerned about the
voices of those around her that she wasn't
listening to her own heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now, she hears her heart scream with the pure
desire to both run and win more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racecourse is where she wants to be, and her
manager, moved to tears by the heartfelt joy she
displayed on the track, agrees that she should
continue racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Takarazuka Kinen, the final race of
the Senior Spring Triple Crown and our chance to
show Tamamo Cross what Gold City's really made
of!
